attendees: Maria Santos, James Lee, Priya Patel, Tom Chen, Anna Kim, David Brown
discussion_notes: The team reviewed the current sprint progress. Backend API is 80% complete, with authentication endpoints remaining. Frontend dashboard redesign is on track for next week's demo. Priya raised a concern about third-party API rate limits — the team agreed to implement a caching layer. Tom presented the load test results showing the system handles 10K concurrent users.
action_1: Implement Redis caching layer for external API calls
action_3: Prepare demo environment for stakeholder review
